mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, doctor_id, triggered_by, model_registry_id, input_snapshot, status, started_at, completed_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM diagnosis_session WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diagnosis_session ( tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, doctor_id, triggered_by, model_registry_id, input_snapshot, status, started_at, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{encounterId}, #{doctorId}, #{triggeredBy}, #{modelRegistryId}, #{inputSnapshot, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE diagnosis_session SET patient_id = #{patientId}, encounter_id = #{encounterId}, doctor_id = #{doctorId}, triggered_by = #{triggeredBy}, model_registry_id = #{modelRegistryId}, input_snapshot = #{inputSnapshot, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
